name: Lortelle Kecheln
description: The heroine of the game "Sylvania's Failed Sword Saint". The adopted daughter of the owner of the Elte Trading Company, also known as the Golden Daughter. She is one of the 6 main characters in the original story of the game. In the original game, she was directly related to most of the bad endings, and was said to have been a nuisance character who angered many users, calling her the "bad ending maker".

name: Maximilian Calypse
description: Maxi is abused by her father and compared to her half sister in every way, she is told that she is to marry a knight and she does so fearing the same treatment. She has almost no self esteem, and due to the abuse she suffered she has developed a stutter, something she is very self conscious about. Maxi's speech impediment is based off of the original author's own personal experience with having a stuttering speech depending on mood and level of excitement. name: Rurina
description: **Region:** Galar **Hometown:** Hulbury **Trainer class:** Gym Leader **Occupation:** Model Rurina (Nessa) is the Gym Leader of Hulbury's Gym, known officially as Hulbury Stadium. name: Sasuke Furuta
description: A vassal of Oda Nobunaga. He is an aesthete, a person who holds a dear appreciation of art and beauty. He is obsessed with the form of glazed pottery, tea, and architecture. He is married to Osen.

name: U-In
description: U-In was a student under Dr. Delein, and has no known last name that is currently revealed. He is an independent awakener with no affiliation. His ability is telekinesis. U-In becomes friends with Ji-U, Ji-Seok and Su-Bin.

name: Yoshiteru Zaimokuza
description: Zaimokuza is a student from class 2C who suffers from adolescent delusions. He displays a high interest in historical shoguns, magic, and writing (despite the fact he is a terrible writer), and video game creation. He often talks like a movie narrator or with grandiose overtones. He sometimes refers to himself and those around him in the 3rd person and involves them in his fantasy/roleplaying scenarios. He sees Hachiman as a friend after being paired up with him during physical education lessons

name: Yuuhi Amamiya
description: The main character of the story. A reclusive, glasses-wearing college student who initially refuses Noi Crezant's request to help save the world. The reason behind his unsocial nature is his grandfather, who raised Yuuhi and believed that having friends was useless. Eventually, he changes his mind in order to help Samidare Asahina, who he usually refers to as Princess. His ability is called domain control. name: Ada Wong
description: Ada Wong is a red-clad, cunning and formidable secret agent of Chinese heritage with a mysterious past. Initially a private agent, Ada was drawn into the intrigue and treachery that is the corporate world when she was recruited by the "Organization" to participate in their activities against their primary rival, Umbrella Pharmaceutical, Inc.
